title: Create ApprovalFlow and ApprovalFlowStep Eloquent models
acceptance_criteria: App\Models\ApprovalFlow created with name, model_type, description fillable
ApprovalFlow has steps() HasMany relationship ordered by step_order
App\Models\ApprovalFlowStep created with approval_flow_id, role_id, step_order fillable
ApprovalFlowStep has role() BelongsTo relationship to Spatie Role model (App\Models\Role)
Both models use proper table names (approval_flows, approval_flow_steps)
